A '''yaggie''' was a small, [[Color/Legends|green]], winged creature hunted for both its hide and meat on [[Greater Marianas]]. They were considered to have little intelligence.

==Behind the scenes==
In [[2001]], this creature appeared in [[Star Wars Tales 10|tenth issue]] of [[Dark Horse Comics]]'s ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series, present in a story entitled "[[Trooper (comic story)|Trooper]]." [[Leland Chee]], [[Canon|continuity]] referee of [[Lucasfilm]], stated that elements of those ''Tales'' comics are considered S-canon until referenced by C-canon materials.<ref name="canon">{{Blog|holocron|56|starwars.com forum HolocronKeeper comments archive}}</ref> He later confirmed on his Facebook page that this particular story was intended to be non-canon.<ref>{{Facebook|username=Keeper-of-the-Holocron|url=pages/Keeper-of-the-Holocron/201820953172172#!/permalink.php?story_fbid=233318370022430&id=201820953172172|name=[[Leland Chee]]|date=2011-07-12|nobackup=1}}</ref>
